data.body: STRATEGIC PIVOT (2026-07-13): the serial auto-lander this epic delivered is being RETIRED. After a sustained bug spiral (dc33/15a1/0d3e) + the FFO re-CI cost, the owner decided the client-side rebase bridge is too expensive to maintain for a POC. Superseded by epic d4de (fleshy-kimberlite-crayfish): switch main FFO->Rebase-If-Necessary so Gerrit integrates server-side, drop the bot, agents Submit directly, post-merge main CI + manual revert as the bounded-risk safety net. The delivered stories (S1-S6) remain closed (work was real); the ARCHITECTURE is superseded. See ADR 0047.
